response.step_by_step_log:
1. Performed initial analysis: identified song title "Breaking Dimensions" from on-screen text at 00:32.
2. Identified performers as the Hololive English -Justice- VTuber unit (Raora, Gigi, Cecilia, Elizabeth) based on the tag #Justice3D and common knowledge of the unit associated with this song.
3. Conducted web search: '"Breaking Dimensions" Justice3D lyrics' to find the full lyrics.
4. Confirmed lyrics are in English. The original language of the song is English.
5. Constructed the JSON object with the song metadata and retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video is a 3D virtual stage performance of the song "Breaking Dimensions" by the Hololive English -Justice- VTuber unit. It features the performance itself followed by a brief outro/announcement segment.

scenes.description: The four members of Hololive English -Justice- perform the song 'Breaking Dimensions' on a 3D virtual stage, with on-screen text confirming the title and production credits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive English -Justice- (Raora Panthera, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Look up at the horizon together as one
A star is on the rise and it's only begun
The pivotal moment we're clamoring for
An infinite future's at our door
Yeah
It's a timeless story with a new feel
Not just allegory, it's real
Wake up, big dreams about to come true
That means it's time to break through
Never knew we could make it this far
Always striving, thriving, here we are
Achieving the impossible
We're virtually unstoppable
We can't sit still, we just keep moving
Now everybody sing
We're making our way to the next dimension
We'll reinvent the world that we live in
We'll bleed everyday with new intentions
Break conventions
One bright room
This is it
With flashing barriers, lightning, and rock
Stronger than any other, we're sailing high
So get together, let's reunite
Reach out, reach out, the future's bright before our eyes
